context.value:
Key files for User Management:
- Schema: shared/schema.ts (users table)
- Auth: server/auth.ts, client/src/hooks/use-auth.tsx
- API routes: server/routes.ts (GET/PUT/DELETE /api/users)
- Client hooks: useUsers(), useUpdateUser(), useDeleteUser() in use-auth.tsx
- App routing: client/src/App.tsx
- Navigation: client/src/components/Layout.tsx
- Existing UI components: Radix UI (Dialog, Select, etc.)
